title: Soft Night Sounds
poem_text:
Drip drop soft on the pane,
Pitter patter like rain.
Hush now, wind through the trees,
Whispering on the breeze.
Cricket chirp in the grass,
Rustle rustle as we pass.
Owl hoots low, far away,
Night sings soft—time to stay.
cover_context: A cozy bedroom window glows with moonlight, raindrops sliding down the glass while fireflies flicker in the quiet night.
style_prompt: Children's musical poem, music box and light tambourine, 90 BPM, soft and settling, warm steady rhythm, almost a lullaby, clear warm vocal, every word easy to understand
